---
name: SDK bug
about: Something wrong in @ohm_studio/sdk, @ohm_studio/sdk-react-native, or @ohm_studio/sdk-core
title: "[sdk] "
labels: ["bug", "sdk"]
---

**Package + version**
e.g. `@ohm_studio/sdk@0.5.1`

**Runtime**
- [ ] Browser (Chrome / Firefox / Safari + version)
- [ ] Node (`node -v`)
- [ ] React Native (Expo SDK / RN version)
- [ ] Other (describe)

**What happened**
A clear description.

**What you expected**
Per the docs at https://docs.ohm.doctor — the section that contradicts
the behaviour you observed.

**Reproduction**
Smallest possible code that triggers it. Inline or a link to a
gist / minimal repo.

**Logs / errors**
Stack traces, console output, network response bodies. Redact any
real API keys or PHI before posting.
